entries.label: Shopflow read-only runtime seam consumption
entries.summary: Keeps Switchyard seam consumption honest: read-only, repo-local, and separate from merchant live proof while serving as a starter-bundle companion for Codex and Claude Code.

entries.label: Shopflow live browser ops
entries.summary: Encodes the browser/profile ownership rules, login-attempt ceiling, and focus-safe live helper order for operator lanes, which makes the Claude Code starter bundle more plug-and-play without claiming a public skills pack.

entries.label: Shopflow builder-facing discoverability and ready-sync
entries.summary: Keeps agent-facing front doors, starter bundles, and ready-to-sync copy truthful instead of overclaiming public distribution.
mustNotClaim: Public discoverability skill pack already shipped
